message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction

participant <<Android>> AAOSHAL as Actor1
participant <<Android>> AAOSCarAPI as AAOSCarAPI1
participant AACS_CarControlHandler as AACS_CarControlHandler1
participant AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver as AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver1
participant AACS_CoreService as AACS_CoreService1
participant AutoSDK as AutoSDK1

Actor1 ..> AAOSCarAPI1 : HVAC_FAN_SPEED = (0x0500|SYSTEM|3|SEAT)

AAOSCarAPI1 ..> AACS_CarControlHandler1 : True/Throw Exception

AACS_CarControlHandler1 ..> AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver1 : True/False

AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver1 ..> AACS_CoreService1 : Success/Failure (Intent)

AACS_CoreService1 ..> AutoSDK1 : SetRangeControllerValue Reply (AASB Message)

@enduml
